things.name: Great Barrier Reef Dive & Snorkel
things.description: The world's largest coral reef system — day trips depart daily from the Reef Fleet Terminal

things.name: Skyrail Rainforest Cableway
things.description: Gondola ride over the UNESCO-listed Wet Tropics rainforest canopy to Kuranda village

things.name: Daintree Rainforest Day Trip
things.description: The world's oldest tropical rainforest — crocodile spotting, cassowaries and Cape Tribulation beach

things.name: Kuranda Village
things.description: Rainforest village reached by Skyrail or Scenic Railway — markets, butterfly sanctuary and birdworld

things.name: Cairns Esplanade & Lagoon
things.description: Free saltwater lagoon on the beachfront — surrounding parkland with mudskippers in the mangroves

things.name: Hartley's Crocodile Adventures
things.description: Australia's oldest wildlife park with twice-daily croc shows, cassowaries and koala holding

things.name: Atherton Tablelands
things.description: Volcanic crater lakes, waterfalls and platypus spotting on the fertile highlands above Cairns

things.name: Cairns Regional Gallery
things.description: Indigenous and contemporary Australian art in a beautiful 1936 heritage building in the city centre

things.name: Tjapukai Aboriginal Cultural Park
things.description: Award-winning immersive experience of Aboriginal culture — boomerang throwing, fire making and storytelling

things.name: Night Markets
things.description: Cairns' famous nightly market with Asian street food, massages, souvenirs and live entertainment
